_meta.title: Yazio — The Personal Nutrition Coach (Blue Monster)
_meta.note: Demo preset inspired by a real, publicly-known nutrition app. Not a real client engagement.

clientDesc: Yazio is a global nutrition app with a mission to help as many people as possible live healthier lives. With millions of users in more than 150 countries, this remote-first company helps people track their calories, fasting windows, and overall diet. We want to turn their friendly blue monster mascot into a 24/7 interactive pocket coach. Users can literally talk to the mascot to log their meals by voice; the AI buddy gives personalized dietary advice based on their goals, tracks progress, sends friendly reminders to drink water, shares healthy lifestyle tips, and — most importantly — gives users enthusiastic compliments and motivation every time they hit a health milestone.
